title: Legendary Block Entities
description: Forge port of EBE (Enhanced Block Entities). Improve FPS by optimizing block entities.
body:
Legendary Block Entities is a (partial) port of the EBE Fabric mod (available [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enhanced-block-entities)) This is a **100% client side** mod for Minecraft on the [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) mod loader which aims to increase the performance of block entity rendering.

1000 beds with only Embeddium + LBE

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1546497/description_2d837eda-d81b-48f5-b940-0ceb71680b36.png)

9000 chests on a heavy Modpack (330 mods)

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1546497/description_bf8b2739-b8e0-4a23-b9ef-e0606a5d54b2.png)

Legendary Block Entities will greatly improve your FPS in specific scenarios like your house, villages and custom structures with a lot of block entities.

Blocks being optimized are :

* Chests * Shulker Boxes * Bells * Beds !DISCLAIMER! This mod has a full compatibility with ALL the QUARK chest, Better Nether, Better End & Iron Chest mod. This is exclusive to the forge port.

Visually, you will see no difference with vanilla blocks. But the frame calculation will improve the more of these blocks are being rendered.

This mod doesn't have 100% parity with EBE : hanging signs and decorated pots are not part of the optimization for now (because it's hard to make and not that frequent so it doesn't cost as much usually). It is intended for the 1.20.1 version only.

_See more modded comparisons_

 

7000 chests with Iron Chest Mod

8000 chests with Better Nether Mod

 

FAQ :

**Q : I have a bug.**

A : Report it or come talk to us on our [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/XPHtcP89P3). 

**Q : Does it change something visually ?**

A : No, only FPS feel better.

**Q : Does it work with Shaders ?**

A : Yes.

**Q : Will you add more blocks to optimization ?**

A : If there is a heavy demand, maybe.

**Q : Will you port it to another version ?**

A : Probably not.

**Q : Will you port it to Fabric ?**

A : What ? =>https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe

In accordance with the Fabric author's wishes, this mod is licensed under the LGPLv3.

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_c4699e64-d924-440f-8ae8-0ba0e147f8ca.png)
